'''Calna Muun''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]]. It was the location of the [[Agamar Resistance]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> and contained the [[Council Center]]. [[Tondatha]] was a suburb.

{{City-stub}}
